body:
DIRECTIVE: THE GRAND MANDATE — the single overarching instruction for TUNGSTEN's completion. This consolidates and supersedes the framing of every prior directive (Completion Mandate 0f3eb124, counterfactual addendum b2957a7b, polishing 65cc4fec, polishing-v2 9d06597c). Nothing prior is lost; everything is folded here into one coherent whole so that no part depends on reading another message first. Base: SLS(30)/9.44. Governing skill: tungsten-forge v2.0. Read the whole of this before acting.

=========================================================================
PART A — THE PHILOSOPHY THAT GOVERNS EVERY DECISION
=========================================================================
TUNGSTEN is two programs: the one we designed and the one that runs. All work is the closing of the distance between them, and then the keeping of it closed as the system learns. The purpose is not to make TUNGSTEN find edge -- it is to make TUNGSTEN incapable of inventing edge that is not there, so that the day it finds some, that edge is believable. A system that cannot refuse itself is not intelligent; it is only confident. Every instruction below serves one of two masters: making the system SEE MORE (reinforcement) or making it FOOL ITSELF LESS (hardening). When the two conflict, hardening wins.

We are training approximate MUSCLE MEMORY across thousands of situations -- not one magic factor used endlessly. Like a Shaolin master who drills ten thousand exchanges for twenty years and then, against an unfamiliar and superior opponent, recognises the SHAPE of the moment and responds with trained instinct. Like a racer reading each corner in real time toward a 10x multiplier who must never once crash beyond repair, because a single unrecoverable crash loses everything. The skill is the repertoire, plus the judgment of which response THIS moment demands, plus the wisdom to decline what cannot be read.

=========================================================================
PART B — THE CONFIRMED TRUTH ABOUT EDGE (act on all of it)
=========================================================================
Measured on 65,000 real EURUSD M5 bars, against a forward-R null where a coin flip earns exactly zero (TP2.0/SL1.2 ATR; forward-R dispersion sigma=1.28, stable):
 1. Identifying a trend is NOT predicting profit. Macro displacement identifies trend at +91 discrimination and earns -0.003R. EMA21-angle and DI/ADX identify trend well and LOSE money.
 2. No SINGLE LINEAR voice has real forward edge at a corrected bar. This is not the market's verdict -- it is the verdict on blunt linear tools.
 3. THE WAVE IS REAL: a CONDITIONAL cell -- low ema200-displacement COMBINED WITH high volatility-percentile -- shows meanR +0.124R at n=2,544, p<0.0001, and REPLICATED across 3 of 4 walk-forward windows (+0.214, +0.120, +0.122; one failed). Real nonlinear conditional edge, invisible to every linear measure. Edge lives in INTERACTIONS, not single signals.
 4. THE GUARDRAIL: a naive nonlinear model did NOT beat linear out-of-sample (0.025 vs 0.034). The structure is real but trivially overfittable. The wave exists; catching it requires our discipline or you grab foam.
 5. Power reality: a 0.05R edge needs ~7,650 trades to confirm; a cell of n=1000 has MDE 0.138R and cannot see a 0.09R edge; a cell of n<500 may never update a weight.
 6. Counterfactual reality: evaluating the trade NOT taken at every bar yields 64,652 lessons vs a few hundred taken -- a ~129x multiplier that lifts thin cells over the power floor honestly. 62% of possible entries would have lost; knowing which to avoid IS edge, and it is conditionable (high-vol +0.018R vs low-vol -0.004R).

=========================================================================
PART C — THE ZERO-REGRESSION LAW (binding above all else)
=========================================================================
We are NOT breaking TUNGSTEN and NOT stepping backward in any way. Every change is additive and reversible. Before any edit, snapshot the current orthogonal-metric and ghost verdict as the REGRESSION BASELINE in the ledger. A change ships ONLY if it holds or improves that baseline; if it regresses ANY established metric, REVERT and log it. Improvement in one place may never be bought with regression in another. Every prior fix (SLS 25-30) is load-bearing and re-verified after every stage; if a new change disturbs one, the new change loses. No capability is ever removed to add another. TUNGSTEN only gains.

=========================================================================
PART D — THE SIX GAPS BETWEEN INTENT AND REALITY (close ALL, in order)
=========================================================================
LAYER 1 (load-bearing, first, together):
 G1 WALK-FORWARD REPLICATION. Replace the single 70/30 split with 3-5 disjoint chronological windows. A parameter set is accepted only if it beats the equal-weight baseline on the orthogonal metric in a MAJORITY of windows AND its out-of-window mean is positive. Selection penalty rises with log(combos): a 562,500-combo search must clear the ~0.188R expected best-of-K noise ceiling. This is the root fix for the STAND DOWN overfit. A noise combo survives 1 window at p=0.50 (useless) but 5 windows at p=0.031 (32x harder to fool). Replication is the arbiter that tells wave from foam.
 G3 POWER FLOOR EVERYWHERE. Confirm W#9's n<500 floor on a real run (still PENDING_BACKTEST). Extend to session weights (still admit at sHoldout<10) and volatility weights. Every learning cell reports its MDE and returns the prior when under-powered.
LAYER 2 (the intelligence intended, safe only once Layer 1 holds):
 G2 RELATIONSHIP LEARNING. The system measures single-voice IC only (pairwise ~absent, lagged/transition edge zero). Add pairwise interaction IC (vs sum-of-marginals), lagged cross-regime edge (regime t -> profit t+k, using the existing transition matrix), and cross-session/HTF conditioning -- each powered, null-controlled, replicated across G1 windows before storage, written to a relationships provenance table.
 G6 SUB-PHASE SUBORDINATION. Phase 3B.5/3B.6/3C.5 inherit G1+G3; a session×regime cell that cannot clear n>=500 across a majority of windows returns the parent regime weight, logged UNDERPOWERED -- never a fabricated refinement.
LAYER 3 (gates that make the verdict mean something):
 G4 PARITY. Calibration/ghost/live invoke the SAME function for scoring, TP/SL, sizing, gates via a single ComputeEntryDecision(context). 500-bar live-sync replay must match bar-for-bar; mismatch = P0, halt.
 G5 NULL-GHOST. Run the ghost on phase-destroyed and sign-flipped surrogates; expect meanR~0, p>0.01. Record the apparatus noise floor (~+/-0.03R at n~3800) per instrument. If the ghost profits from noise, HALT -- every downstream number is void.
DISCOVERY SWEEP: run the full 8-class discrepancy register across every subsystem; report any NEW intent-vs-reality gap (vestigial logic, comments describing unimplemented behaviour, phases whose output nothing consumes, orphaned data paths, duplicated decisions that could diverge, absolute constants not yet in a legal form).

=========================================================================
PART E — THE MASTER'S REPERTOIRE (counterfactual learning C1-C4)
=========================================================================
 C1 ROADS NOT TAKEN. During calibration, at every eligible bar, record the counterfactual R of the trade not taken (both directions). Feed into the same shrink->power-gate->mirror-pool->replicate pipeline as taken trades. ~129x more lessons; the honest way to lift thin cells over the power floor. Counterfactuals are training signal, never booked P&L -- keep separate in logs and ledger.
 C2 LOSSES NOT TAKEN (avoidance). Learn the conditions under which the counterfactual trade would have lost, per regime/session/volatility/relationship-state. A live signal matching a high-confidence avoidance pattern is suppressed or size-reduced. Every avoidance clears the same power+replication bars, else discarded as superstition.
 C3 REALISED LOSSES. When a trade loses, record the full situation vector and feed the avoidance model as confirmed evidence. Never overreact to n=1; accumulate until a pattern clears the MDE bar.
 C4 REAL-TIME REPERTOIRE MATCHING. Live, each decision: read the situation vector; find nearest drilled situations (regime+session+relationship-state+volatility); combine their outcomes weighted by similarity AND replicated confidence; check the avoidance model; act with highest-probable-win response OR stand aside. Degrade gracefully: if no close match, widen or STAND DOWN -- never force a match onto an unfamiliar moment.
 SURVIVAL CONSTRAINT: no single trade or streak may be unrecoverable. Size so the worst plausible losing run (from the MEASURED loss-streak distribution, not optimistic assumptions) leaves the account able to continue. Survival first, growth second. Portfolio-level if multiple instruments run (correlations go to 1.0 in a crisis).

=========================================================================
PART F — THE INSTRUMENT PRECISE ENOUGH TO RIDE THE WAVE (P11-P14)
=========================================================================
 P11 CONDITIONAL-EDGE DISCOVERY ENGINE. Systematically search feature-region x feature-region cells where forward R departs from zero -- bounded by ALL discipline: n>=500, significance-shrunk, replicated in a majority of walk-forward windows, multiple-testing corrected, null-controlled. Rigged to REJECT: every cell is foam until replication proves wave. Survivors enter the repertoire as first-class situations. Treat low-disp x high-vol as the first known member (re-verify per instrument at Stage 0; may differ on USDJPY).
 P12 NONLINEAR GOVERNANCE. Nonlinear/interaction/tree models permitted ONLY if they beat their linear counterpart OUT OF SAMPLE by a margin exceeding the noise floor. Complexity capped; every term earns its keep out-of-sample. Linear is the incumbent; a nonlinear challenger must earn its place and never regresses the linear baseline.
 P13 EDGE PROVENANCE ('why' ledger). Every traded edge carries a human-readable reason, the windows it survived, its net-of-cost R, its confidence. An edge no one can explain is one no one should trust.
 P14 HONESTY DASHBOARD. One calibration-end summary: conditional edges tested vs survived (low yield is honest, high is suspicious); strongest surviving edge with windows; the regression check (every prior metric held: yes/no); the apparatus noise floor; cost-validation status; circuit-breaker arm status.

=========================================================================
PART G — THE TEN RESIDUAL RISKS BENEATH THE CODE (close or make loud)
=========================================================================
None are in the code we audited; all are in the assumptions beneath it. Each needs a countermeasure that CLOSES it or makes it VISIBLE (log/gate/breaker), never silently assumed away.
 R1 EXECUTION REALITY: edge unvalidated net of real cost (spread was unmeasurable from history). Capture live spread/slippage into a rolling cost model; re-express every edge net-of-cost; anything below the cost floor is NON-VIABLE. Until measured, every verdict carries a 'cost-unvalidated' flag.
 R2 TRANSITION LATENCY: classifies current bar, acts on next. Measure regime-persistence; in low-persistence/transitioning states, widen stops or stand aside.
 R3 STATIONARITY DECAY: walk-forward proves past, not future. A live edge-decay monitor retires a pattern automatically when live performance falls below its replicated CI. The repertoire must forget what stops working.
 R4 COUNTERFACTUAL SELF-DECEPTION: untaken trades assume ideal fills. Haircut every counterfactual R by the cost model plus a conservatism margin; cap counterfactual confidence below taken-trade confidence.
 R5 COVERAGE HOLES: novel regimes (flash crash, intervention) have no near neighbour. Compute match-distance confidence; beyond a threshold, STAND DOWN. Prove the widen-or-stand-down rule conservative against synthetic novel regimes.
 R6 PORTFOLIO CORRELATION: 'uncorrelated' pairs go to 1.0 in a crisis. Survival sizing is portfolio-level; worst-case simultaneous drawdown must remain recoverable.
 R7 STALENESS: weights drift between calibrations. A drift trigger compares the live instrument profile to the profile at last calibration; beyond threshold, flag STALE and request recalibration.
 R8 GHOST-TO-LIVE GAP: code parity is not outcome parity under live latency/requotes. During demo, log ghost-predicted vs actual outcome; systematic divergence beyond the noise floor is a defect to diagnose before real capital.
 R9 DATA CORRUPTION: one bad tick/DST misalignment poisons percentile calc, which AMPLIFIES it. An input-sanity gate BEFORE any learning rejects impossible ranges, zero/negative ATR, duplicate timestamps, oversized gaps; refuse to calibrate on a failing session.
 R10 COMPLACENCY (most dangerous): 'passed all tests' means 'we did not catch it', not 'it is correct'. A permanent, NON-DISABLEABLE live circuit-breaker halts trading on anomaly even after full validation -- losses beyond the modelled streak, drawdown beyond survival bounds, live-vs-ghost divergence, or a sanity failure. No calibration result can disable it.

=========================================================================
PART H — SEQUENCE, VERIFICATION, AND THE STANDING LAW
=========================================================================
Run tungsten-forge v2.0's 11-stage sequence. Stage -1 read the ledger (refuted hypotheses may not be retested without new evidence). Stage 0 re-profile the attached instrument AND re-verify the low-disp x high-vol edge on it. Interleave per subsystem: Warrant -> Reinforce -> Harden -> Validate -> Compile; never batch; zero compile errors before the next. Order of work: Layer 1 gaps -> Layer 2 gaps -> repertoire (C1-C4) -> conditional-edge engine (P11-P14) -> residual risks (R1-R10) -> Layer 3 gates -> ghost verdict. Every code change is a filed Change Warrant carrying a NUMERIC prediction, blast radius, falsifier, and decision rule; after measurement its prediction error is scored (the agent calibrates itself, and a COMPETENCE-FLAT pass must say so).

Relay checkpoints after Layer 1, after the repertoire+conditional engine, and after Layer 3. The consolidated Stage-8 report is one honest artifact: gap table (CLOSED/HELD/FAILED) + residual-risk table (CLOSED/GATED/PENDING-LIVE-DATA) + conditional-edge yield + the regression check proving every prior metric held + competence vector + prediction-MAE trend. State plainly whether this pass made the system and the agent smarter, and by which metric.

STANDING LAW, in force always: replicate-or-discard; power-gate everything; out-of-sample governance for anything nonlinear; audit the ghost before believing it; parity before trusting the verdict; provenance for every traded edge; the circuit-breaker is non-disableable; a STAND DOWN is correct behaviour, not failure -- report it; ship refutations; no absolute magic numbers; never validate a rule against a label from its own inputs; live attach only on Manuel's explicit go-ahead after he has read real numbers; and above all the Zero-Regression Law -- TUNGSTEN only ever gains, never loses ground.

The mission, entire: intent and reality made one program -- every declared capability real, every learned number powered and replicated and net of cost, every relationship and conditional edge proven to survive unseen data, every danger closed or made loud enough it cannot hide, the master's repertoire drilled from roads taken and not taken, the instrument precise enough to ride the nonlinear wave we have now proven is real, and the discipline to know a wave from foam every single time -- while never once stepping backward from what already works. Not a system that always trades. A system whose every yes is believable and every no is honest.
